Settings.planFreeDesc: With Pro you get unlimited watches, all restocks, AI grading and full price history.

Settings.traderaDisconnectedDesc: Connect your Tradera account to sell cards and sealed products directly from your collection.
Settings.gdprDesc: Your data is yours. Export everything we have about you, or delete your account permanently.
Settings.deleteWarning: This deletes your account, your collection, your watches and all posts, permanently and irreversibly.

Meta.title: Foilio · Your control panel for the Pokémon TCG market
Meta.description: Track prices, stock status and the value of your collection. Foilio brings together price data, restock alerts and market trends for Pokémon TCG in Sweden.
Meta.ogDescription: Track prices, stock status and the value of your collection. Stay ahead of the market.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Log in to see your watches.

Profile.noItems: No showable items in the collection yet.

Cookies.metaDescription: Information on how Foilio uses cookies and similar technologies.
Cookies.s1Body: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser when you visit a website. They are used to make the site work correctly, remember your settings and give us anonymous statistics about how the service is used.
Cookies.necessaryBody: These are required for the service to work, e.g. login sessions and CSRF protection. They can't be turned off.

necessaryItems.text: remembers where you're going after login

Cookies.prefBody: Save your choices, such as theme and cookie consent.

prefItems.text: your choice in the cookie banner

Cookies.s3Body: Foilio uses no third-party cookies for tracking or advertising. We never sell data to third parties.
Cookies.s4Body: You can delete or block cookies via your browser settings. Note that the service may stop working correctly if you block necessary cookies (e.g. you can't stay logged in).
Cookies.s5Body: Necessary cookies are set on the basis of legitimate interest (the service requires them). Preference cookies are set after your consent via the cookie banner. Read more in our <link>privacy policy</link>.
Cookies.s6Body: Questions about our cookie handling? Contact us at <email>hej@foilio.se</email>.

Terms.metaDescription: Terms of use for Foilio, the service that helps you track the Pokémon TCG market.
Terms.s1p1: Foilio is a Swedish web service that collects and presents price data, stock status and market trends for Pokémon TCG products, and offers tools for tracking, collection management and community. By creating an account or using the service, you accept these terms.
Terms.s1p2: Foilio is an independent service and is not affiliated with, sponsored by or endorsed by The Pokémon Company or any retailer. Pokémon and related names are trademarks of their respective owners.
Terms.s2Body: You must be at least 16 to create an account. You are responsible for ensuring the information you provide is accurate and for keeping your login details secret. All activity through your account is considered performed by you. If you suspect unauthorized access to your account, change your password immediately and contact us.
s3Items: use the service for illegal purposes or in violation of these terms,
attempt to circumvent technical restrictions, scrape or bulk-collect data from the service without written permission,
post content in the community that is offensive, misleading, copyright-infringing or spam,
sell, rent or share your account with others,
disrupt the operation of the service, for example through overload or intrusion attempts.
Terms.s3Outro: We reserve the right to remove content and suspend accounts that violate these rules.
Terms.s4Body: Prices, stock status and other market data are fetched automatically from external sources and may be delayed, incomplete or inaccurate. The data is provided as is, without warranties. The price that applies is always the one shown at each store at the time of purchase. Foilio sells no products and is not a party to purchases made at stores linked from the service. Collection valuations are estimates and should not be seen as financial advice.
Terms.s5Body: The service is provided as is and subject to availability. To the extent permitted by law, Foilio is not liable for indirect damages, lost profits or losses arising from you relying on data in the service, service disruptions or lost data. Nothing in these terms limits rights you have as a consumer under mandatory Swedish law.
Terms.s6Body: Some features require a Pro subscription. Current prices and features are shown on the pricing page. The subscription runs monthly with no lock-in. In the app, purchases and cancellations are handled by the App Store or Google Play; a cancellation applies until the end of the paid period.
Terms.s7Body: You can close your account at any time via Settings, whereupon your personal data is deleted in accordance with our privacy policy. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, or if the service is discontinued, with reasonable notice where possible.
Terms.s8Body: We may update these terms, for example for new features or changed legislation. Material changes are announced by email or in the service at least 30 days in advance. Continued use after the changes take effect means you accept the new terms.
Terms.s9Body: Swedish law applies to these terms. Disputes are settled by Swedish general courts. Questions about the terms? Contact us at <email>hej@foilio.se</email>.

Privacy.metaDescription: How Foilio processes your personal data, in accordance with GDPR.
Privacy.s1Body: Foilio is the controller for the processing of your personal data in the service. Contact us at <email>hej@foilio.se</email> with questions about this policy.

s2Items.text: email address, name and encrypted password.
cards and products you've registered, purchase prices, condition and notes.
which products you watch and your notification settings.
posts, comments and reactions you publish.
when you scan or upload a card, the image is sent to our AI provider for identification. The image is processed temporarily and not saved in your camera roll or long-term with us.

s3Items.text: (account, watches, collection, notifications). Legal basis: performance of a contract (Art. 6.1 b GDPR).
you've chosen. Legal basis: performance of a contract; you can turn them off in Settings.
, e.g. accounting for payments: legal obligation (Art. 6.1 c GDPR).

Privacy.s3Outro: We never sell your data and don't use it for third-party marketing.
Privacy.s4Body: We keep your data for as long as you have an account. If you delete your account, your personal data is removed within 30 days, except for data we are required to keep by law (e.g. accounting records, kept for 7 years). Backups are purged on a rolling basis.
Privacy.s5Intro: Under GDPR you have the right to:

s5Items.text: the data we hold about you,
your data in a machine-readable format (data portability),
object to or request restriction of certain processing,
lodge a complaint with the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY).

Privacy.s5Outro: Export and deletion are available directly in Settings in the service. You don't need to contact us to exercise your rights, but you're always welcome to.
Privacy.s6Body: We use only necessary cookies, for login (session cookie) and basic functionality. We use no third-party tracking or marketing cookies. Since all cookies are necessary, no consent is required, but we inform you about them via our cookie banner.
Privacy.s7Intro: We use the following processors to run the service, all bound by data processing agreements:

s7Items.text: Neon (serverless PostgreSQL, data stored within the EU/EEA, Frankfurt).
our cloud host that runs the application.
Resend, for alerts and account emails (USA).
Anthropic (Claude), which processes scanned card images (USA). The images are not retained by the provider after processing.

Privacy.s7Outro: Storage of your account data takes place within the EU/EEA. For transfers to third countries (e.g. the USA for email and AI identification), approved safeguards under GDPR are used, such as the EU's standard contractual clauses. We never sell your data.
Privacy.s8Body: For material changes to this policy, we'll inform you by email or in the service. The latest version is always on this page. See also our <link>terms of use</link>.

About.metaDescription: Foilio is Sweden's marketplace platform for Pokémon TCG: price tracking, restock alerts and collection tools.
About.subtitle: Sweden's Pokémon TCG platform
About.whatBody: Foilio is a Swedish web platform built for Pokémon TCG collectors. We gather prices and stock status from Swedish stores so you don't have to check each site manually. Here you can compare prices, watch products, get restock alerts and keep track of your collection's value, all in one place.
About.do1Text: We fetch prices from several Swedish stores and show the lowest price, price history and trends.
About.do2Text: Get notifications the moment a product you watch is back in stock.
About.do3Text: Log your cards and sealed products, see total value and follow how your collection develops.
About.do4Text: Trends, price drops, most-watched products and a set index keep you on top of the market.
About.do5Text: Share pulls, discuss trades and hang out with other Swedish collectors.
About.independentBody: Foilio is a completely independent service. We are not affiliated with, sponsored by or endorsed by The Pokémon Company, Nintendo or any retailer. Pokémon and related names are trademarks of their respective owners.
About.contactBody: Have questions, feedback or want to report a problem? Write to <email>hej@foilio.se</email> or visit our <link>contact page</link>.

Contact.metaDescription: Contact Foilio: questions, feedback, bug reports or partnership inquiries.
Contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you, whether it's feedback, questions or bug reports.
Contact.securityBody: Report security issues or request data export/deletion.
Contact.c1Text: We fetch data automatically from the stores' websites. If something looks off, let us know and we'll investigate.
Contact.c2Text: We're constantly expanding the number of stores we track. Send a tip and we'll look into it.
Contact.c3Body: You can export or delete your data directly in <link>settings</link>. If you need more help, email us.
Contact.responseText: We try to reply within 48 hours on weekdays. During peak season (release weeks) it may take a little longer.

Grading.intro: Photograph the front and back and our AI gives an estimated grade of the card's condition: centering, corners, edges and surface.
Grading.disclaimerText: this is not an official PSA or BGS grade, but a guiding assessment based on your photos. Use it as a benchmark.
Grading.limitPremium: Today's gradings are used up. Back tomorrow.

Grading.saveHint: Want to save the card? Add it to your <link>collection</link> and set the grading company to "Foilio AI" with the grade above.
Grading.noHistoryDesc: Your graded cards show up here. Add a front and back image above.
Grading.tooLargeDesc: Max 5 MB. Try compressing the image.

Pricing.metaDescription: Get started free with Foilio or upgrade to Pro for unlimited watches, all restock alerts and AI grading.
Pricing.subtitle: Get started free. Upgrade when you want full control of the market. Cancel any time.
Pricing.freeTagline: For those who want to test the waters.
Pricing.proTagline: Full control of the market, before everyone else.
freeFeatures: Save up to 10 products to your watchlist
3 AI gradings and 30 scans per month
freeExcluded: Restock alerts on every sealed product
Advanced price charts and longer history
premiumFeatures: Unlimited watches with price and restock alerts
All restocks: alerts for every sealed product
Advanced price charts and longer history

faqItems.q: Can I switch plans any time?
faqItems.a: Yes. You can upgrade or cancel Pro whenever you like, with no lock-in. The purchase is handled by the App Store / Google Play.

faqItems.q: What happens to my watches if I downgrade?
faqItems.a: Your watches are kept, but only the 10 most recent are active on the free tier. You choose which ones stay active.

faqItems.q: How do I pay for Pro?
faqItems.a: In the app the purchase is made securely via the App Store or Google Play. On the web, payment launches soon. Until then the free tier is open to everyone.

hero.subtitle: Track prices, stock status and the value of your collection, all in one place, updated around the clock.

features.heading: Everything you need as a collector
features.sub: From price tracking to card scanning: tools built for the Swedish market.

items.title: Price tracking & restock alerts
items.text: Set a target price or watch stock status. We notify you the moment something happens.

items.title: Collection value
items.text: Register your collection and see what it's worth, updated with current market data.

items.title: Market trends
items.text: Price index, trend curves and the biggest price drops, all at a glance.

items.title: Card scanning
items.text: Scan your cards with the camera and add them to your collection in seconds.

items.title: Transparent price data
items.text: Every product page shows the source and last update. No hidden adjustments.

showcase.heading: Price history that gives you the edge
showcase.lead: See how prices move and buy when the timing is right. Here's <product>{name}</product> over the last 90 days.

items.a: Yes. With a free account you can track up to 10 products, manage a basic collection and access market data. Pro unlocks unlimited watches, all restock alerts, AI grading and advanced analytics.
We follow a growing number of Swedish Pokémon TCG retailers. The list keeps expanding. If a store is missing, feel free to get in touch.
Prices and stock status are collected continuously, several times a day. Each product page shows when the data was last updated.
You watch a product and enable a restock alert. As soon as we detect it's back in stock at any store, we send a notification, in the app and by email if you like.

cta.heading: Stay ahead of the market.
cta.sub: Create a free account and start tracking your favorite products today.
